src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the deprecated @EnableWebFluxSecurity annotation as it is no longer required in Spring Security 6+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The annotation @EnableWebFluxSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; keeping it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) or is ignored if the class is missing, but explicit removal is required for clean migration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update oauth2ResourceServer configuration to use the new lambda DSL with withDefaults() instead of the deprecated method reference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method oauth2ResourceServer(OAuth2ResourceServerSpec) or the specific jwt() method signature without arguments is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6; the new API requires a Consumer<OAuth2ResourceServerSpec> and jwt(Customizer<JwtDecoderSpec>).

Remove the ReactiveJwtAuthenticationConverter bean definition, likely because authority conversion is now handled differently or by default configuration.
